assertions.name: scenario_a_concurrent_session_with_mid_sale
assertions.note: Workspace pre-conditions unmet on 2026-04-13 baseline (inventory_sync_paused=true OR v2 IDs NULL). Run live after Phase 7 prereqs are seeded.

sideEffectsSummarySql:
-- Side-effects summary for stress run: concurrent-count-session-2026-04-18T19-17-57-205Z
-- Run via: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f - <<'EOF'

select 'external_sync_events' as table_name, count(*)::text as cnt
  from external_sync_events
  where correlation_id like 'concurrent-count-session-2026-04-18T19-17-57-205Z%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'concurrent-count-session-2026-04-18T19-17-57-205Z'
union all
select 'warehouse_inventory_activity', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_inventory_activity
  where correlation_id like 'concurrent-count-session-2026-04-18T19-17-57-205Z%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'concurrent-count-session-2026-04-18T19-17-57-205Z'
union all
select 'warehouse_review_queue', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_review_queue
  where group_key like 'stress:concurrent-count-session-2026-04-18T19-17-57-205Z:%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'concurrent-count-session-2026-04-18T19-17-57-205Z'
union all
select 'webhook_events', count(*)::text
  from webhook_events
  where external_webhook_id like 'concurrent-count-session-2026-04-18T19-17-57-205Z%'
union all
select 'warehouse_locations', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_locations
  where name like 'TEST-concurrent-count-session-2026-04-18T19-17-57-205Z-%';

-- EOF
notes: Live path requires staff-authenticated count-session Server Actions; same shim as manual-count-burst.
Scenario A test: mid-session synthetic shipstation decrement on one of 5 SKUs to verify the v4-corrected `delta = current - sumOfLocations` produces no double-decrement.
